occurrence_sentence: University of Sheffield Launches Quantum Center to Develop Technologies
A new research centre with the potential to revolutionize computing, communication, sensing and imaging technologies was launched by the University of Sheffield in 2020.

The [Sheffield Quantum Centre](https://quantum.shef.ac.uk/), which will be officially opened by Lord Jim O'Neill, Chair of Chatham House and University of Sheffield alumnus, is bringing together more than 70 of the University's leading scientists and engineers to develop new quantum technologies.
A new research centre with the potential to revolutionize computing, communication, sensing and imaging technologies was launched by the University of Sheffield in 2020.

The [Sheffield Quantum Centre](https://quantum.shef.ac.uk/), which will be officially opened by Lord Jim O'Neill, Chair of Chatham House and University of Sheffield alumnus, is bringing together more than 70 of the University's leading scientists and engineers to develop new quantum technologies.

interaction_phrase: led by the University's Department of Physics and Astronomy, Department of Electronic and Electrical Engineering and Department of Computer Science
occurrence_sentence: Led by the University's Department of Physics and Astronomy, Department of Electronic and Electrical Engineering and Department of Computer Science, the Sheffield Quantum Centre will join a group of northern universities that are playing a significant role in the development of quantum technologies.

interaction_phrase: The University of Sheffield has a strong presence in quantum research with world leading capabilities in crystal growth, nanometre scale device fabrication and device physics research.
occurrence_sentence: The University of Sheffield has a strong presence in quantum research with world leading capabilities in crystal growth, nanometre scale device fabrication and device physics research.

interaction_phrase: host to the National Epitaxy Facility
occurrence_sentence: The University of Sheffield has a 40-year history of pioneering developments in semiconductor science and technology and is host to the National Epitaxy Facility.

occurrence_sentence: He has served as a writer, editor and analyst at The Quantum Insider since its inception.
